text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ooouch...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Haha, looks like I messed up pretty badly. The
doctor was impressed I wasn't crying from the
pain.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I was gonna cry, the doctor's scary face
was waaay more likely to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Bwahaha... haha, ha...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Umm... You were supposed to laugh at that.
choice_data_list: Sorry... It's my fault you got hurt...
Sorry... It's my fault you got hurt...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer. Is your overwhelming positivity
on vacation?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...We have another race coming up too. If I don't
push myself here, then where else?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You know what we have to do now, right?
choice_data_list: Everything possible to help you heal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You know what we have to do now, right?
choice_data_list: Everything possible to help you heal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? No, I'm saying I should push mysel—
choice_data_list: Not with an injury like that, you're not!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
A-all right, all right! Fine! No need to go all angry
parent on me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, it wasn't supposed to be like this... I said
way too many things that are out of character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she seems unhappy with the decision,
Nice Nature gives in and decides to focus on her
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Of course! I'll be right as rain.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ngh! O-ow!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Why does it have to hurt now? I look so
lame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature's injury is serious, so I decide that she
shouldn't push herself right now and make her
take some time off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If I stop here, it'll just push my goals even further
away.
choice_data_list: We'll get back on track when you recover.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh, there's the confidence I'm used to. I'm glad
you're back to your usual self.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All righty then! Let's quickly get this injury healed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With renewed motivation, Nice Nature works on
her recovery. Soon after, she gets back to
training.
